message:
feat(storage): tick 149 search/semantic cluster — storage cx-first coverage NOW 140/140 (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-eighth and final sibling-expansion tick for StorageHandle.
Adds 10 new `_with_cx` siblings for the search/semantic cluster,
closing the last gap. Every pub async fn on StorageHandle (140
total) now has a cx-first sibling.

New siblings:
- search_with_cx (composite → search_with_results_with_cx)
- search_with_options_with_cx (composite → search_with_results_with_cx)
- search_with_results_with_cx (leaf read path)
- store_embedding_with_cx (leaf write path)
- get_unembedded_segments_with_cx (leaf read path)
- get_embedding_with_cx (leaf read path)
- embedding_stats_with_cx (leaf read path)
- store_embedding_f32_with_cx (composite: packs f32 → bytes, routes
  through store_embedding_with_cx)
- semantic_search_with_cx (leaf read path)
- hybrid_search_with_results_with_cx (leaf read path; 9 args + cx)

Each leaf sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` then delegates.
Composites additionally route their internal async calls through
`_with_cx` siblings so the whole chain honours cancellation.

Test: `storage_tick149_search_semantic_cluster_roundtrip` seeds a
pane + two output_segments (segment_embeddings has FK on
output_segments.id), then:
- exercises all 3 FTS search paths on an empty index (must roundtrip
  to empty vec)
- stores f32 embedding on seg_a via the composite, stores raw bytes
  on seg_b via the leaf, confirms get_embedding_with_cx returns the
  stored bytes verbatim
- confirms get_unembedded_segments_with_cx returns empty under the
  seeded embedder and both segments under a different embedder
- confirms embedding_stats_with_cx reports one embedder with count=2
- exercises semantic_search_with_cx (hits ≤ 2) and the 10-arg
  hybrid_search_with_results_with_cx composite

Verified via fork bypass: 496/496 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 140/140 pub async fns (100%). No legacy
methods without a cx-first sibling remain. The ft-xbnl0.2.3 Cx-first
direct-sweep phase is now complete for StorageHandle; future ticks
can focus on migrating internal call sites off the legacy wrappers
or pushing cx threading deeper into related subsystems (recorder,
mux, native_events).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
